text.title: Serverless Architecture Patterns Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: ADR proposes API Gateway + Lambda for a steady 1000 RPS read-only workload.
antipattern.fix: Compute monthly cost at 1000 RPS; compare to Fargate / Cloud Run; choose the cheaper option above break-even.

antipattern.symptom: Latency SLO 100ms p99 on a JVM Lambda with no provisioned concurrency.
antipattern.fix: Either reduce runtime (Node/Python), enable provisioned concurrency / SnapStart, or pick containers.

antipattern.symptom: SQS-triggered Lambda creates a charge per message; duplicate deliveries double-charge customers.
antipattern.fix: Persist event_id in DynamoDB conditional put; skip on duplicate.

antipattern.symptom: Lambdas + event sources clicked together in console; one accidental deletion bricks prod.
antipattern.fix: Reverse-engineer into SAM / CDK; remove console-edit IAM permissions.
